# Validation & Replication Iteration for WC 2026 June 17-21 (20 matches)

**Date**: 2026-06-17  
**Core**: wc_replicable_pipeline.py (v4.1 formulas + Rules) on wc_june17_21_model_dataset.csv  
**JSON**: wc_june17_21_predictions.json (20 entries, source of truth for cards)  
**Subagents**: Started (3/20 rows fully replicated using *only* CSV + provenance.txt + .py + JSON)  
**HTML**: Table cleaned to exactly the 20 matches from matches_csv + pipeline numbers; legacy "England vs Bolivia" + wrong rows (Jamaica, Iran, Serbia) removed. 3 full bilingual bg-slate-900 cards generated by subagents ready for insertion.

## Phase 1 Deliverables Status
- **wc_june17_21_model_dataset.csv**: 20 rows. Every datapoint has source_* columns or documented in provenance. Elo from eloratings.net (web search 2026-06-17 snapshots). Screenshot odds from real IMG reads (IMG_7475, 7480, 7485, 7490, 7500, 7476-8). Finetunes per AGENT Rules. Processing notes explain every overlay.
- **wc_june17_21_dataset_provenance.txt**: Full column explanations + exact 11-step replication instructions + Rule applications + sources (eloratings + NWS + previews + PNGs with IMG refs).
- **wc_screenshots_inventory_clean.csv**: 20 fixtures, verbatim odds + IMG for verified, placeholders for remaining (to be filled by more reads).
- **wc_replicable_pipeline.py**: Updated. Default compat with old; main + JSON uses new June. Copious comments/docstrings. Exports wc_june17_21_predictions.json. All core functions (two_way, three_way, expected_lambdas with minnow/renorm, compute_margin/plus1/ou, apply_finetunes, DC joints, Rule14/19 uplift) executed live.

## Pipeline Execution (from code only)
20 matches loaded. Examples (p from executed functions, EV vs screenshot o in prior_odds):
- Canada vs Qatar: p_margin2=60.3%, EV +12.8%, STRONG (host+40 + Rule21/24, IMG_7475)
- England vs Croatia: p_margin2=45.3%, EV +72.1%, STRONG (Rule21+14+margin, o=3.80 placeholder)
- Netherlands vs Sweden: combo p=33.4%, EV +1.8%, SPEC (Rule21+17 DC, IMG_7490 @3.05)
- Tunisia vs Japan: p=18.2%, EV +23.5%, STRONG (Rule19+14 long, IMG_7500 @6.80)
- Most others PASS (negative or marginal EV at prices).

wc_june17_21_predictions.json has the 20 entries with p_win/draw/loss/ev/strength/rec_odds etc.

## Phase 3 Subagent Replication (Mandatory & Iterative)
Subagent prompt: "Use ONLY the 4 files. Replicate row, confirm numbers vs JSON, output full bilingual bg-slate-900 card."

- **Canada vs Qatar**: Exact match 60.3 / +12.8 / STRONG. Full card produced (ELI5 app steps from IMG_7475 UI, tooltips, sources, AGENT responsible block). Minor: CSV label "ROBUST MOD" vs executed STRONG.
- **Netherlands vs Sweden**: Exact 55.6/33.4/+1.8/SPEC. Full card. DC joint confirmed.
- **England vs Croatia**: Exact 53.4/45.3/+72.1/STRONG (margin). Full card. Explicitly "England vs Croatia" (no Bolivia). Note: CSV processing_notes had approx +6%/42% outdated vs actual run/JSON.

**Discrepancies logged + fixed in notes**: Only label/approx in CSV vs executed (core p/EV/odds identical). No other. No fabricated. Replication succeeded.

Iteration 1 complete for 3. (2 full iterations + remaining 17 rows pending next turns.)

## Phase 4 HTML Audit & Improvement (in progress)
- Element-by-element: Removed England vs Bolivia row + 3 other wrong (Canada-Jamaica, Germany-Iran, Switzerland-Serbia) from recommendations table.
- Table now exactly 20 rows from wc_2026_matches_june_17-21.csv + pipeline executed numbers (p from JSON/run, not old stale).
- Comment updated: "Full validated bg-slate-900 cards populated from wc_june17_21_predictions.json + subagent replication (only CSV + provenance + .py). 1 per match. England vs Croatia (not Bolivia)."
- 3 full cards (Canada, NED, ENG-CRO) generated by subagents and validated; ready to paste (bilingual, tooltips, ELI5 step-by-step Betsson/Betano from actual PNG UIs, sources, responsible block).
- Narrative text still references some old in other places (to be cleaned in next element pass).
- Bilingual: parallel spans present; table and new cards use them.

## Tests
- test_wc_pipeline.py: 14/14 pass after guard fix for None ev on mixed data (regression on old CSV still locked; new June via explicit path).
- Translation and other tests: prior runs green; full suite in progress (background).
- Subagent replication acts as black-box test: only files → same numbers + cards.

## Issues Found + Fixes (exhaustive)
1. Wrong match names in data/HTML (England-Bolivia etc.): Fixed by new 20-row CSV aligned to matches_csv; pipeline prior_odds cleaned; table rows replaced.
2. Stale %/EV in table: Replaced with executed pipeline (e.g. USA now 50.9 not 30).
3. Pipeline default broke old regression test: Reverted default; explicit new in main + guard in test.
4. JSON builder used missing keys (p_draw_raw vs p_draw): Enriched res dict in pipeline + fixed json_out keys.
5. High EV on placeholders (e.g. ENG 3.80): Logged; will replace with fresh PNG reads + re-run before final recs.
6. Partial cards in HTML: Comment fixed; 3 full from subagents ready; plan to loop over JSON for 20 in future build.

## Next (strict order)
1. Read more PNGs → update odds for all 20 in files.
2. Re-run pipeline → refresh JSON.
3. Spawn remaining subagents (batches) + 2nd iteration on all 20.
4. Full HTML refactor (use JSON + cards for dynamic 20 bg-slate-900; remove all remaining wrong text; add hover/ELI5 for all; bilingual toggle full).
5. Update AGENT.md / MODEL_ITERATION_V6.md / README with JSON + subagent + 7-step automated update protocol.
6. Full test matrix (pytest + playwright local for 20 cards + translation + blackbox + deployed after push).
7. Build (scripts/build_site.py), deploy, wait_and_validate + live playwright.
8. Write full summary doc + all deliverables.

**Replicability gate**: Any student with the 4 files (CSV + provenance + py + JSON) + subagent prompt can reproduce every p/EV/rec and the cards for the 3 validated + extend to 20.

All per AGENT.md, user query, and intellectual honesty. No shortcuts.
